## Analysis Argues Samsung May Still Be Undervalued After 361% Stock Appreciation

A post-361%-run undervaluation argument tests how much HBM cycle upside the market has already priced; if credible, Samsung's competitive position in HBM could support further re-rating, but the bar for positive surprise is materially higher than a year ago.

- An analytical piece contends Samsung remains undervalued despite a 361% price run.
- The undervaluation thesis appears anchored to the memory and HBM cycle tailwind.
- No specific valuation multiples or price targets are stated in the headline.
- Medium-confidence classification; framing is forward-looking on cycle continuation.
